title: Pipe Bag and Nozzle kit, Steel Cake Piping Nozzles Equipped with Cleaning Brushes, Reusable, Used for Home DIY Baking Cake Decoration Dessert Cake Cups
features: Meeting Your Needs: A set comprising 12 piping nozzles, 1 cleaning brush, 1 reusable silicone pastry bag, and a plastic adapter will sufficiently assist you in fulfilling most baking decoration requirements.

High-Quality Materials: The pastry bag is made from TPU, ensuring it is resistant to tearing and free from harmful toxins. The piping nozzles are crafted from 304 stainless steel, making them robust and durable.

Ease of Use: The piping bag and nozzle set are easy to assemble, use, and clean. The accompanying cleaning brush allows for thorough cleaning after each use, eliminating any concerns about maintenance.

Versatility: With 12 stainless steel piping nozzles, this set enables you to bring your cake designs to life, allowing you to create a variety of patterns on cupcakes and other cakes. It is particularly well-suited for beginners.

Suitable for Various Occasions: Whether it's baking with children, spending quality time with a partner, professional pastry crafting, or family gatherings, this piping set brings joy to all. It helps you create better memories and stronger bonds.
description: Product Description Upgrade Your Baking with a Professional Piping Set! This 15-piece cake decorating kit includes 12 high-quality stainless steel nozzles , a reusable silicone pastry bag , a cleaning brush , and a plastic adapter – providing everything you need to create beautiful desserts with ease. Why Choose Our Piping Set? Food-Safe & Durable – Made from 304 stainless steel (rust-proof & dishwasher-safe) and a flexible, tear-resistant TPU piping bag for long-lasting use. Effortless Cleaning – The included cleaning brush removes icing residue quickly, keeping your nozzles hygienic for the next use. Perfect for Beginners & Experts – Whether you're practising piping techniques or crafting professional-tier desserts, this set helps you achieve flawless results. Great Gift Idea – An excellent present for home bakers, baking enthusiasts, or anyone who loves decorating cakes and cupcakes . Ideal for: • Birthday cakes & cupcakes • Wedding & celebration desserts • Cookie decorating • Macarons & churros • Family baking activities Bring your culinary creativity to life with this versatile, reusable piping set – order yours today! Suitable kit 1、12 piping nozzles, 1 cleaning brush, 1 reusable silicone pastry bag, and a plastic adapter. 2、Moderate size for a more enjoyable baking experience. 3、The pastry bag is made from TPU, ensuring it is resistant to tearing and free from harmful toxins. The piping nozzles are crafted from 304 stainless steel, making them robust and durable. 4、The piping bag and nozzle set are easy to assemble, use, and clean.
